gates.name: B1_PARITY_GATE
gates.description: Capture Parity Baseline: >= 95% parity with deterministic reason codes

testResults: parity B1: Capture Parity Baseline computes parity from route x breakpoint observations
parity B1: Capture Parity Baseline uses deterministic reason codes
parity B1: Capture Parity Baseline enforces threshold based on true matrix parity
parity B1: Capture Parity Baseline is deterministic for the same input
parity B1: Capture Parity Baseline classifies parity reasons consistently
parity B1: Capture Parity Baseline keeps report structure machine-readable

gates.name: B2_DETERMINISM_GATE
gates.description: Deterministic Normalization: <= 1% unexpected diff over 20 repeated runs

testResults: determinism B2: Deterministic Normalization should normalize entry by zeroing generatedAt
determinism B2: Deterministic Normalization should canonicalize numeric values to 3 decimals
determinism B2: Deterministic Normalization should normalize manifest by sorting entries and zeroing timestamps
determinism B2: Deterministic Normalization should strip entropy from manifests for determinism
determinism B2: Deterministic Normalization should classify diffs as expected vs unexpected
determinism B2: Deterministic Normalization should mark diffs as expected when in expected set
determinism B2: Deterministic Normalization GATE: B2_DETERMINISM_GATE - unexpected diff rate <= 1%
determinism B2: Deterministic Normalization should handle node array normalization with sorting

gates.name: B3_BLUEPRINT_GATE
gates.description: Blueprint quality gate enforces >= 0.90 threshold and >= 50% malformed fallback reduction

testResults: runCli returns non-zero for unknown command
runCli returns 1 when capture run fails
runCli writes compact manifest and logs manifest size
runCli always writes parity-report.json when parity is enabled
runCli fails when parity threshold is not met
runCli fails when selector mismatch budget is exceeded
runCli counts selector mismatch budget per key across a check
runCli fails when artifacts are emitted without parity observations
runCli fails when malformed fallback reduction is below B3 threshold
runCli writes blueprint quality report when B3 reduction gate is evaluated

B4: Manifest Compatibility Validator validateCompatibilityMatrix rejects manifests from unsupported package versions

gates.name: B5_CONFIDENCE_GATE
gates.description: Hybrid confidence gate requires hit/invalidation targets, no user-visible regression, and rollback drill <= 10m

testResults: resolution-types exposes runtime-only default policy
resolution-types allows all declared source tags
resolver prefers explicit blueprint over runtime path
resolver returns dynamic resolver intent by default
resolver accepts candidate validation as no-op in phase 1
resolver uses strict-precomputed only on explicit strict pilot routes
resolver falls back to hybrid serving route when strict route does not match
resolver allows disabling hybrid mode for route prefixes
resolver confidence metrics computes manifest and fallback ratios from counters
resolver confidence metrics diffs cumulative counters into route windows
resolver confidence metrics marks confidence gate pass and promotion eligibility on second passing window
resolver confidence metrics marks rollback when hit ratio and invalidation thresholds breach rollback floor
resolver confidence metrics GATE: B5_CONFIDENCE_GATE - promotion eligible after two passing windows
resolver operational acceptance passes when there is no user-visible regression and rollback drill meets 10-minute SLO
resolver operational acceptance recommends rollback when user-visible regression is detected
resolver operational acceptance GATE: B5_CONFIDENCE_GATE - operational acceptance requires no regression and rollback drill <= 10m
resolver with manifest support prefers explicit blueprint over manifest
resolver with manifest support checks manifest when no explicit blueprint provided
resolver with manifest support falls back to dynamic when manifest lookup fails
resolver with manifest support skips manifest in runtime-only mode
resolver with manifest support enforces strict manifest in precomputed-only mode
resolver with manifest support returns placeholder when precomputed-only and manifest fails
resolver with manifest support reports shadow-hit but serves dynamic output in hybrid shadow mode
resolver with manifest support reports shadow-miss when manifest key is missing
resolver with manifest support classifies miss reasons without regex fallback
resolver with manifest support reports shadow-invalid when manifest entry is stale
resolver with manifest support uses session fallback in hybrid mode when manifest entry is invalid
resolver with manifest support tracks phase 5 telemetry counters for invalidation and session fallback

gates.name: B6_STRICT_GATE
gates.description: Strict rollout requires <= 1% fallback anomaly, zero P0/P1 incidents, and two-window promotion evidence

testResults: strict rollout policy helper enables strict-precomputed on compatible canary routes
strict rollout policy helper falls back to hybrid when strict compatibility is blocked and hybrid serving is available
strict rollout policy helper falls back to runtime-only when hybrid serving is unavailable
strict rollout policy helper preserves legacy strict path behavior when tiered lists are absent
strict rollout policy helper GATE: B6_STRICT_GATE - canary compatibility enables strict-precomputed
strict rollout SLO evaluator passes a strict canary window when anomaly and incidents are within thresholds
strict rollout SLO evaluator recommends rollback when anomaly breaches rollback ceiling
strict rollout SLO evaluator GATE: B6_STRICT_GATE - strict rollout requires <=1% anomaly and zero P0/P1 incidents for two windows
